# `technology` — technology templates

**Industry:** Technology / Developer  ·  **Templates:** 3

Phishing templates targeting developers and technical staff through developer platform impersonation

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| API Key Expiration Notice | [`api_key_expiration.html`](api_key_expiration.html) | credential_harvest | advanced | 30-50% |

## Template details

### API Key Expiration Notice

- **File:** [`api_key_expiration.html`](api_key_expiration.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** advanced · **Est. click rate:** 30-50%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/technology_education.html`](education/technology_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Your API key expires tonight — regenerate now
  - Critical: Production API key reaching expiration
  - Developer alert: API authentication credentials expiring
- **Operator notes:** Best for engineering and DevOps teams. The combination of production urgency and technical language bypasses skepticism in technical staff.

### GitHub – New Device Sign-In

- **File:** [`github_new_device.html`](github_new_device.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/technology_education.html`](education/technology_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - [GitHub] A new device signed in to your account
  - Please verify a new sign-in to your GitHub account
  - Security alert: new sign-in to GitHub
- **Operator notes:** Developer-focused sign-in alert. High value: a compromised GitHub account can expose source code and secrets.

### AWS – Account Verification

- **File:** [`aws_account_verification.html`](aws_account_verification.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/technology_education.html`](education/technology_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Action required: verify your AWS account
  - Your AWS account is scheduled for suspension
  - AWS: confirm your billing information to avoid interruption
- **Operator notes:** Cloud-account suspension lure for engineering/DevOps. Threat of stopped resources drives urgency.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
